extensions.name: HTTP Client
extensions.description: Send HTTP requests from .http files with AI-powered request generation. Supports GET, POST, PUT, DELETE with environment variables and response visualization.
extensions.author: Nimbalyst
extensions.changelog:
### 1.0.0
- Initial release
- GET, POST, PUT, DELETE support
- Environment variables
- Response formatting

extensions.name: JSON/YAML Visual Editor
extensions.description: Interactive tree-view editor for JSON and YAML files with schema validation, search, and AI-powered transformations.
extensions.author: Nimbalyst
extensions.changelog:
### 1.2.0
- Schema validation support
- AI transformations
### 1.1.0
- YAML support
### 1.0.0
- Initial release

extensions.name: Catppuccin Theme
extensions.description: Popular pastel theme for Nimbalyst with four flavors: Latte (light), Frappe, Macchiato, and Mocha (dark).
extensions.author: Nimbalyst
extensions.changelog:
### 2.0.0
- All four flavors
- Updated for latest --nim-* variables
### 1.0.0
- Mocha flavor only

extensions.name: Dracula Theme
extensions.description: Official Dracula color scheme for Nimbalyst. A dark theme with vibrant accent colors.
extensions.author: Nimbalyst

extensions.name: Mermaid WYSIWYG Editor
extensions.description: Visual drag-and-drop editing of Mermaid diagrams. Bidirectional: edit visually and the code updates, edit code and the canvas updates. AI generates diagrams from descriptions.
extensions.author: Nimbalyst
extensions.changelog:
### 1.0.0
- Flowchart support
- Sequence diagram support
- AI generation from descriptions

extensions.name: Wiki Links & Backlinks
extensions.description: Add [[wiki-style]] linking between documents with a backlinks panel. AI suggests relevant links as you write.
extensions.author: Nimbalyst
extensions.changelog:
### 1.0.0
- [[wiki link]] syntax
- Backlinks panel
- AI link suggestions

extensions.name: CI/CD Pipeline Editor
extensions.description: Visual editor for GitHub Actions, CircleCI, and GitLab CI workflows. Drag-and-drop pipeline steps with AI-assisted configuration.
extensions.author: Nimbalyst
extensions.changelog:
### 0.9.0
- Beta release
- GitHub Actions support
- Visual step editor

extensions.name: Slide Deck Presenter
extensions.description: Create presentations from markdown with speaker notes, transitions, and theme support. Present directly from Nimbalyst.
extensions.author: Nimbalyst
extensions.changelog:
### 1.0.0
- Markdown-to-slides conversion
- Speaker notes
- Multiple themes

extensions.name: Session Analytics Dashboard
extensions.description: Visualize your AI session patterns, token usage, cost tracking, and productivity metrics across all sessions.
extensions.author: Nimbalyst
extensions.changelog:
### 1.0.0
- Token usage charts
- Session duration tracking
- Cost estimates

extensions.name: Nord Theme
extensions.description: Arctic, north-bluish color palette for Nimbalyst. Clean and minimal dark theme.
extensions.author: Nimbalyst
